changelog: Massive optimization update with new gaming features, stability improvements, and UI enhancements.

changes: Added Advanced FPS Optimizer with intelligent background service management
New Network Optimizer to reduce latency and improve online gaming performance
Complete UI redesign with smoother animations and modern interface
Added Startup Manager for controlling launch applications
Introduced Real-Time Performance Monitor (CPU, GPU, RAM, Disk, Network)
Added Restore Point creation before applying optimizations
Improved BIOS Optimizer with additional safe optimization presets
Faster process scanning with improved detection accuracy
Reduced application startup time by over 60%
Improved auto-updater reliability and download speeds
Fixed multiple crashes and memory leaks
General stability, security, and performance improvements
